support.question: How can I get customer support?

faqs.question: What is this platform?
faqs.answer: This platform allows users to create AI-generated photos, trade photo licenses, and earn rewards through exposure and engagement.

faqs.question: Is it free to join?
faqs.answer: Yes, signing up is completely free.

faqs.question: Do I get any rewards for signing up?
faqs.answer: Yes, you will receive **100 free points** after completing your profile.

faqs.question: Can I sign up using Google?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can sign up using either Google login or email.

faqs.question: Can I change my profile information later?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can update your profile anytime in the Account menu.

faqs.question: What happens if I delete my account?
faqs.answer: All your data (photos, points, scores, etc.) will be permanently deleted and **cannot be recovered.**

faqs.question: What kind of photos can I upload?
faqs.answer: Only **real human face photos** are allowed.

faqs.question: Can I upload animal, cartoon, or background images?
faqs.answer: No. Non-human images (animals, cartoons, backgrounds, etc.) will not be registered in the gallery.

faqs.question: How long does photo generation take?
faqs.answer: It takes about **30 seconds** after clicking “Validate & Generate.”

faqs.question: Why do I only get two generated images?
faqs.answer: The system provides two optimized results for you to choose the best one.

faqs.question: Can I upload multiple photos?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upload multiple photos to your gallery.

faqs.question: Why do I need to purchase other users' photos?
faqs.answer: Purchasing photo licenses gives you **exposure opportunities**, which help you sell your own photos.

faqs.question: What are exposure opportunities?
faqs.answer: They represent how many times your photo can be shown to others.

faqs.question: How many exposure opportunities can I get?
faqs.answer: You can receive between **1 and 99 exposures** per purchase.

faqs.question: Can I choose how many exposures I get?
faqs.answer: No, exposure amounts are assigned randomly within the given range.

faqs.question: How do I sell my photos?
faqs.answer: Select a market, choose a photo, set exposure, and click **Sell**.

faqs.question: What happens if my photo doesn't sell?
faqs.answer: You will receive a **failure notification**, and the selling attempt ends.

faqs.question: How do I know if my photo is selling?
faqs.answer: You will receive **real-time notifications** about your sales progress.

faqs.question: What happens after all exposures are used?
faqs.answer: A **final summary popup** will show your results.

faqs.question: What is Photo Fusion?
faqs.answer: It is a feature that combines two photos to create a new one.

faqs.question: What are the requirements for fusion?
faqs.answer: Your photo must have a **score of 5 or higher**.

faqs.question: How long does fusion take?
faqs.answer: Fusion takes a short processing time after clicking the **Fuse** button.

faqs.question: What are points used for?
faqs.answer: Points can be used within the platform and redeemed for rewards like gift cards.

faqs.question: How do I check hidden scores?
faqs.answer: You can use **1 Locky** to unlock and view hidden point scores.

faqs.question: How do I redeem a gift card?
faqs.answer: Once you reach the required point level, you can request a gift card, and details will be sent via email.

faqs.question: What are packages?
faqs.answer: Packages include **market entry tickets** that allow participation in different markets.

faqs.question: How do tickets work?
faqs.answer: Each ticket allows entry into **one market**, and usage depends on the market's base price.

faqs.question: Can I cancel a purchased package?
faqs.answer: No. **All package purchases are non-refundable.**

faqs.question: What payment methods are supported?
faqs.answer: Payments are made via **credit card.**

faqs.question: Can I get a refund after using a package?
faqs.answer: No, once a package is purchased and used, it **cannot be refunded.**

faqs.question: What happens if I upload an invalid photo?
faqs.answer: If the photo is not a valid human face, it will **not be added to the gallery.**

faqs.question: Is there any limit to deleting and recreating accounts?
faqs.answer: Account deletion is permanent, and previously deleted data cannot be restored.
